name: Country Pork and Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 pound roasted pork tenderloin, diced (about 2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together 1/4 cup stock and cornstarch. Set aside.
2. In a 4-quart saucepan, bring the remaining stock to a boil. Add noodles and cook for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in bell pepper, peas, and black pepper. When the noodles are soft, stir in the cornstarch slurry.
4. Cook until slightly thickened. Stir in pork and butter. Heat through.
